mapper.sql: SELECT mt.id, mt.tech_code, mt.tech_name, mt.tech_format, mt.tech_price, mt.tech_type, mt.price_type, mt.deptment_id, mt.ai_category_code, d.dept_name FROM medical_technology mt LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = mt.deptment_id
mapper.select:
ORDER BY mt.tech_type, mt.tech_name
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_request WHERE medical_technology_id = #{id}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection_request WHERE medical_technology_id = #{id}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM disposal_request WHERE medical_technology_id = #{id}) )
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_technology SET tech_name = #{techName}, tech_format = #{techFormat}, tech_price = #{techPrice}, tech_type = #{techType}, price_type = #{priceType}, deptment_id = #{deptmentId}, ai_category_code = #{aiCategoryCode} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", dept_name AS "deptName" FROM department WHERE delmark = 1 ORDER BY dept_name
